title: Oil prices extend gains as Trump comments diminish hopes for a U.S.-Iran peace deal
summary_full: Oil prices rose Tuesday amid concerns over a prolonged Middle East conflict after President Trump's comments that the ceasefire with Iran is on "life support"
summary_public: Oil prices rose Tuesday amid concerns over a prolonged Middle East conflict after President Trump's comments that the ceasefire with Iran is on "life support"

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: diminish hopes for a U.S.-Iran peace deal
